subcodes.first_line: A Tablet from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Countenance, when the horizon of utterance shone forth with the Sun of wisdom and exposition, that he may be strengthened thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الوجه اذ لاح افق البیان بشمس الحکمه و التبیان لیویده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
